examples: Medical attention seems to have actually killed President Garfield, who succumbed to a fatal infection introduced by his doctors' unsterile treatment techniques after he was shot by an assassin.
The assassin said he had acted alone.
The poster for Ninja Assassin features Rain but half of his face is off the page.
Ubisoft is developing the Assassin's Creed film by itself, after talks with Sony disintegrated last year.
